resposta:
solution: ```
class Solution:
    def compress(self, chars: List[str]) -> int:
        n = len(chars)
        if n == 0:
            return 0
        write = 0
        read = 0
        while read < n:
            char = chars[read]
            count = 0
            while read < n and chars[read] == char:
                read += 1
                count += 1
            chars[write] = char
            write += 1
            if count > 1:
                for digit in str(count):
                    chars[write] = digit
                    write += 1
        return write
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Two-pointer in-place overwrite: read scans groups, write builds compressed array. Single pass, constant extra space.
